title: Incorrect upload speeds with podman push
body:
### Issue Description

I am seeing incorrect upload speeds when pushing large container images up from my home office internet connection. I have 1000 Mbps down and 40 Mbps up and Podman reports that I am pushing up at 898.4 MiB/s which is clearly not the case.

```bash
Copying blob e3907d99f167 [==========>---------------------------] 1.9GiB / 6.9GiB | 898.4 MiB/s
Copying blob 53426296ad68 done   | 
Copying blob 5dd9abdc9025 done   | 
Copying blob 86c5e9487dc8 done   | 
Copying blob cb66ed916443 done   | 
Copying blob f61481d110a8 done   |
```



### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create a very large container image. Mine are around 7GiB in size.
2. Push up from connection that doesn't have a very fast upload.
3. Observe incorrect upload speeds.


### Describe the results you received

Incorrect upload speeds.

### Describe the results you expected

Correct upload speeds
